title: Smoky Egyptian Lentils Stew
description: A hearty, peppery lentil stew infused with smoky Appleton Rum and aromatic bhuna spices, perfect for a lowfat crowdpleaser.
instructions: Rinse the red lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a large pot, heat a splash of oil over medium heat and add the diced onion and carrot; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and stir until fragrant, 30 seconds.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and black pepper, cooking for 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Add the lentils, diced tomatoes, and vegetable broth; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Stir in the Appleton Rum, letting the steam carry its smoky aroma; simmer uncovered for another 5 minutes to reduce slightly.
Let the stew rest for 5 minutes before serving to meld flavors.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
